subject: [DCAE] Revise Heartbeat Ms container version
commit_message:
[DCAE] Revise Heartbeat Ms container version

Bumpup to 2.6.0 for L release

Change-Id: Ief51f5bd64e794baf5e15315d4f7df242a9f44ef
Signed-off-by: Vijay Venkatesh Kumar <vv770d@att.com>
Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-2953

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/6216/ : FAILURE

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/6216/ )
